languages.text: "Ваша расторопность делает вам честь, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Увы, не сказать того же о вашей прозорливости и готовности к бремени власти. Но я позволю вам сохранить лицо — подождите здесь, сделав вид, что припоздали". {n}Искаженный вокс-синтезатором голос Себериана звучит искренне. Вопрос лишь в том, насколько эти эмоции правдивы.{/n}

"Your swiftness is commendable, my heir. Which, alas, is more than I can say about your foresight or your readiness to bear the burden of power. But I will let you save face. Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ваша расторопность делает вам честь, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Увы, не сказать того же о вашей прозорливости и готовности к бремени власти. Но я позволю вам сохранить лицо — подождите здесь, сделав вид, что припоздали". {n}Искаженный вокс-синтезатором голос Себериана звучит искренне. Вопрос лишь в том, насколько эти эмоции правдивы.{/n}

languages.text: "Eure Schnelligkeit ist bemerkenswert, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Leider kann ich das von Eurer Weitsicht und Eurer Bereitschaft, die Bürde der Macht zu tragen, nicht behaupten. Aber Ihr dürft Euer Gesicht wahren. Wartet hier und tut so, als wärt Ihr zu spät gekommen." {n}Dank des Störsignals seines Vox-Synthesizers klingt Seberians Stimme aufrichtig. Wie ehrlich seine Gefühle tatsächlich sind, wird sich zeigen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your swiftness is commendable, my heir. Which, alas, is more than I can say about your foresight or your readiness to bear the burden of power. But I will let you save face. Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Eure Schnelligkeit ist bemerkenswert, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Leider kann ich das von Eurer Weitsicht und Eurer Bereitschaft, die Bürde der Macht zu tragen, nicht behaupten. Aber Ihr dürft Euer Gesicht wahren. Wartet hier und tut so, als wärt Ihr zu spät gekommen." {n}Dank des Störsignals seines Vox-Synthesizers klingt Seberians Stimme aufrichtig. Wie ehrlich seine Gefühle tatsächlich sind, wird sich zeigen.{/n}

languages.text: « Votre rapidité est remarquable, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Je ne peux hélas pas en dire autant de votre prévoyance ou de votre disposition à supporter le poids du pouvoir. Mais je vous laisserai garder la face. Attendez ici et faites mine d'être en retard. » {n}Sous la distorsion du synthétiseur-vox, la voix de Seberian paraît sincère, mais l'authenticité de ces émotions reste à prouver.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your swiftness is commendable, my heir. Which, alas, is more than I can say about your foresight or your readiness to bear the burden of power. But I will let you save face. Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Votre rapidité est remarquable, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Je ne peux hélas pas en dire autant de votre prévoyance ou de votre disposition à supporter le poids du pouvoir. Mais je vous laisserai garder la face. Attendez ici et faites mine d'être en retard. » {n}Sous la distorsion du synthétiseur-vox, la voix de Seberian paraît sincère, mais l'authenticité de ces émotions reste à prouver.{/n}

languages.text: «Su velocidad es encomiable, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}. Por desgracia, no puedo decir lo mismo sobre su previsión ni su preparación para cargar con el peso del poder. No obstante, le permitiré salvar su honor. Espere aquí y finja que ha llegado un poco tarde». {n}Bajo la distorsión del voco sintetizador, la voz de Seberian parece sincera. Aún está por ver si hay verdad en ella.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your swiftness is commendable, my heir. Which, alas, is more than I can say about your foresight or your readiness to bear the burden of power. But I will let you save face. Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Su velocidad es encomiable, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}. Por desgracia, no puedo decir lo mismo sobre su previsión ni su preparación para cargar con el peso del poder. No obstante, le permitiré salvar su honor. Espere aquí y finja que ha llegado un poco tarde». {n}Bajo la distorsión del voco sintetizador, la voz de Seberian parece sincera. Aún está por ver si hay verdad en ella.{/n}

languages.text: "Hızın övgüye değer vârisim. Ne yazık ki bu, öngörün veya gücün yükünü taşımaya hazır olman hakkında söyleyebileceğimden daha fazlası. Ancak yüzünü kurtarmana izin vereceğim. Burada bekle ve biraz geç kalmış gibi davran." {n}Voks sentezleyici bozunumu, Seberian'ın sesini samimi gösteriyor. Bu duyguların ne kadar gerçek olduğu ise henüz belirsiz.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your swiftness is commendable, my heir. Which, alas, is more than I can say about your foresight or your readiness to bear the burden of power. But I will let you save face. Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}

Burada bekle ve biraz geç kalmış gibi davran." {n}Voks sentezleyici bozunumu, Seberian'ın sesini samimi gösteriyor. Bu duyguların ne kadar gerçek olduğu ise henüz belirsiz.{/n}

languages.text: “你的高效值得称赞，我的继承人。可惜，你的远见，以及你承担权力重担的觉悟，我可就不敢恭维了。不过我会给你留点面子。你就在这儿等着，假装只是来晚了那么一小会儿。”{n}在音阵合成器的扭曲之下，塞贝里安的声音听起来十分真诚。至于那份情感到底有几分是真的，就不好说了。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your swiftness is commendable, my heir. Which, alas, is more than I can say about your foresight or your readiness to bear the burden of power. But I will let you save face. Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたの速さは称賛に値する、私の後継者。しかし、残念ながら、あなたの先見の明や権力の重荷を負う覚悟については、同じことは言えません。しかし、私はあなたの面目を保つことを許します。ここで待っていて、少し遅れたふりをしましょう。」{n}ボイス・シンセサイザーの歪みで、シベリアンの声は誠実なものに聞こえる。その感情がどれだけ本物かは、まだわからない。{/n}

Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}
